summary: Unblocked local dev: replaced pnpm dev tsx entry with scripts/dev.mjs (initial tsc, then tsc -w plus node --watch dist/index.js) to avoid tsx/esbuild transforming yoga-layout top-level await. Fixed pnpm dev -- args by stripping a leading -- before forwarding to node. Removed ink-markdown (CJS require of Ink caused ERR_REQUIRE_ASYNC_MODULE under Node ESM); AssistantMarkdown now uses Marked + markedTerminal + raw Ink Text. Added marked ^11 and marked-terminal ^7 as direct dependencies. Verified pnpm exec tsc, timeout pnpm dev -- --help, and pnpm test run.
current_status: XibeCode dev workflow runs compiled output; TUI markdown uses in-tree renderer without ink-markdown; tests passing.
